intro: The principles behind how I build and scale AI organizations.

principles.title: Outcomes over prototypes
principles.description: I build AI organizations around measurable business outcomes — not research prototypes left on the shelf.

principles.title: Research, engineering, and business as one system
principles.description: I connect research, engineering, and business so work moves from the lab into clinical and commercial impact.

principles.title: Distributed teams that operate as one
principles.description: I grow globally distributed teams and align them around shared goals, so collaboration crosses time zones and disciplines.

principles.title: Build for executive sponsorship
principles.description: I frame technical work in the language of strategy, so AI programs earn the executive sponsorship they need to scale.
